title: dactyloctenium radulans
intro: Dactyloctenium radulans, also known as finger grass or finger millet, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Dactyloctenium radulans include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat digestive problems. The herbal preparations of Dactyloctenium radulans include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
